assertions.title: Rotate button on profile row navigates to Rotate Keyset

steps.action: Create returning-multi welcome state in-session (3 profiles: Rotate Retest Gamma, Rotate Retest Beta, Rotate Retest Alpha)
steps.expected: Welcome shows 2+ profile rows with Unlock and Rotate actions
steps.observed: Welcome rendered three rows in order Gamma, Beta, Alpha, each with Unlock and Rotate

steps.action: Click Rotate on a non-first row (second row: Rotate Retest Beta)

steps.expected: Source Share #1 preloads selected row keyset name (Rotate Retest Beta)
steps.observed: Rotate Keyset form header and Source Share #1 showed 'Rotate Retest Beta', matching selected row

evidence.consoleErrors: none (agent-browser errors returned empty array after flow)
evidence.network: No requests captured for this client-side SPA route transition

frictions.description: Profile setup precondition required opening and dismissing each remote share QR modal before downstream completion controls were reliably enabled in headless flow setup.
frictions.resolution: Opened both QR modals and clicked Done for each profile creation run.

summary: Retested 1 assertion (VAL-WELCOME-010): pass. Rotate on a non-first Welcome row navigated to /rotate-keyset and preloaded the selected profile keyset name correctly.
